calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public Corporation.
No appearance by defendant Hong B. Yim, an individual.
Default entered against defendant on September 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 15, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default hearing was filed on November 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Hong B. Yim, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $158,480.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $16,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $174,980.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
